query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0)::BIGINT as "usage!"
            FROM (
                SELECT size_bytes AS bytes
                  FROM artifacts
                 WHERE repository_id = $1 AND is_deleted = false
                   AND storage_key NOT LIKE 'proxy-cache/%'
                UNION ALL
                SELECT size_bytes AS bytes
                  FROM proxy_cache_artifacts
                 WHERE repository_id = $1
            ) t
